mapper.select: SELECT crp.role_mu, crp.permission_mu, cp.title permissionTitle FROM chaos_role_permission crp LEFT JOIN chaos_permission cp ON crp.permission_mu = cp.mu WHERE crp.is_delete=0 AND cp.is_delete=0 AND crp.role_mu = #{roleMu}
SELECT crp.permission_mu FROM chaos_role_permission crp WHERE crp.is_delete=0 AND crp.role_mu = #{roleMu}
